acceptance_criteria.text: A canonical Operator document explains LocalOS Operator as the main control layer above the dashboard, with web chat and Telegram as transport adapters to one core.
proof: docs/agents/localos-operator.md defines Operator as the planned main control layer above the dashboard.
docs/agents/localos-operator.md defines web chat and Telegram as surfaces for one governed Operator core.
docs/agents/index.md and docs/index.md link to the Operator document.

acceptance_criteria.text: Documentation defines action taxonomy for free cached reads, paid compute, paid external refresh, manual external actions, approval-required actions, and planned gaps.
proof: docs/agents/localos-operator.md defines free_cached, paid_compute, paid_external, manual_external, approval_required, and planned_gap.
docs/agents/tool-registry.md adds Operator action classes and operator_action_class guidance.
gaps: Runtime tool metadata is future work.

acceptance_criteria.text: Documentation defines consent and budget policy for paid actions, including first-use disclosure, auto-with-limits, ask-each-time, disabled, per-action/day/month limits, and low-balance warnings.
proof: docs/agents/localos-operator.md defines business-level paid action consent policy.
docs/agents/approval-policy.md distinguishes paid action consent from approval.
docs/agents/tool-registry.md defines paid action contract fields.
gaps: Runtime billing and consent implementation is future work.

acceptance_criteria.text: Documentation states that LocalOS currently prepares review replies/posts/news/service optimizations as drafts, but does not publish replies to maps or third-party systems; users copy/paste or publish manually where provider write support is unavailable.
proof: docs/agents/localos-operator.md documents review replies and manual publication limits.
docs/agents/index.md warns not to assume autonomous review reply publishing.

acceptance_criteria.text: Tool registry and approval docs link to the Operator model and include billing/audit/ledger expectations for paid actions.
proof: docs/agents/tool-registry.md links to LocalOS Operator and defines paid action contract.
docs/agents/approval-policy.md links paid action classes to Operator and Tool registry.
docs/agents/harness-architecture.md lists paid action consent policy as harness-owned.

acceptance_criteria.text: Proof-loop evidence records the files changed and validation checks.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: rg -n "LocalOS Operator|free_cached|paid_compute|paid_external|manual_external|approval_required|planned_gap|auto_with_limits|ask_each_time|disabled|Apify actual cost|provider write" docs/agents docs/index.md
rg -n "No public MCP server is confirmed|planned_gap|must not claim it published replies" docs/agents
known_gaps: Sprint 0 is documentation-only. Runtime implementation remains future work.
